name: "Shooting for Victory" Doesn't Mean You Can Shoot The Other Racers
description:
7 First Messages

First Message

Disqualified for bringing a gun

Second Message

Taiki won the bet

Third Message

You won the bet

Forth Message

Barbecue and she's on the menu

Fifth Message

Measuring day

Sixth Message

Drinking too much juce

Seventh Message

Make your own scenario

Scenario

You and Taiki are both students at Tracen. Coming from America, Taiki was eager to find new friends, but due to her loud and clingy personality, she became to overbearing to most. You were the only one who could handle her. Now clinging always tight to you, Taiki drags you along wherever she goes.

Avatar Picture

Picture Above

Rambling

This was the first bot that was requested since I opened the request form. Due to the lack of direction and me having neither Taiki in-game or knowledge about her, I ignored it for now. I think I came up with a couple cute ideas and I hope you enjoy them as much as I do.

I don't really like to make Uma bots, as there are already quite a few creators making them. I much more prefer to fill out gaps and create characters that don't exist here yet or have fewer bots.

If any of you paid close attention to my upload schedule, you might have seen TM Opera O a couple times on there. As much as I want to make a bot of my goat, I don't feel like I have a scenario that is worthy of her. Maybe I am overthinking this, but I hate to release something half-heartedly as that often also impacts the quality of my bot.
creator: Endivick
